description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, multi-level roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoors. The structure is set on a broad wooden deck that extends to form a walkway, suggesting an inviting entryway and outdoor living space. The building's facade is primarily light-colored, with contrasting dark roofing and wooden accents. The layout is asymmetrical, with various roof heights and overhangs creating visual interest. The presence of a covered porch area and expansive windows indicates a focus on both comfort and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, multi-level roof, large glass windows, and a broad wooden deck with a walkway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wide wooden deck, large glass windows, and the main entry walkway extending from the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the long wooden walkway leading to the main entrance and the layered roof structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying more glass windows and the continuation of the deck, with the walkway extending to the left.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of the bungalow, roof overhangs, and the deck wrapping around the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
